reviews.review_description: Why did you get rid of mods for more mods when you didn’t have enough space for MORE mods? It makes no sense. At all. why not just keep the mods that got their mod taken away? I just think it’s stupid that you did that.

developer_response.body: I don't get why you have to make a 3 star review when you could've just messaged me about it? It makes no sense how you have to review my game and its irrelevant to the gameplay

reviews.review_description:
First time playing and it's amazing. I love it. 11/10
- BaxelAxel
Creator is toxic, he stole code from other games, and blackmailed my friends do not install

developer_response.body: Listen, I didn't steal any code from any other game, the only code i've used WITH permission was from my friend wyxtt, he helped me with platforms, and I've made my own flying script but it's gone public, but anyways, I haven't blackmailed anyone, When I was working on Human Game, You had the idea of a snow map, I made it in unity, a couple days pass you send 9/11 jokes on my server and then get mad because I timed you out. Then you got mad at me, threatened to sue me with no actual good reason, then you got YOUR server to hate on me without any evidence, I however do have some evidence that your just being a jerk to me for no reason, Also don't forget when I said sorry to you, we were friends for just 1 DAY, then you just banned me from your server out of nowhere without even communicating with me or even giving me a reason why you have banned me, I didn't "blackmail" you or "steal code" I made the game myself, I put actual effort into my games, Your just hating on me because I timed you out on my discord, I just don't get why you have to make a fake review just to ruin my reputation, that is defamation, that is illegal as hell, if anything I can sue you for defamation about making allegations about me.

reviews.review_description: THIS GAME IS TRASH 🗑️ 🤮🤮🤮

reviews.review_title: How to get out of the back rooms guide
reviews.review_description: So once you get in the back rooms u need to go we’re the two wall are all most to we’re u can’t go through like a crack but once u go through there u need to touch the light closest to the wall and the crack if that doesn’t work then just keep touching the lights in that room hopefully this helps and you can tell your friends as of now I am the first person to now of this me and my friend found this when the game first came out and I hope there is more updates in the future good game 👍

reviews.review_title: Kind of generic game but fun
reviews.review_description: I like this game and the gun physics but I feel like this game was kind of bland and not much to do. I also had a couple bad encounters with moderators but that happens with every multiplayer game. Overall ok game and I hope that the remastered version has much more to do. P.S Also you probably have heard this a lot by now but I can’t find the remastered version is it just not out yet or is it on sidequest.

developer_response.body: Hello, I would like to say that the remastered version is finally released! You can try it to better your review on this game, also consider reviewing the remastered version of this game!

reviews.review_description: I loved this game

developer_response.body: Then you will love my next release "Human Game Remastered"

reviews.review_description: The game has a lot of non necessity fun entertaining stuff. But the maps and models aren't too detailed and gameplay is short while playing with friends. This game is truly great, besides maps. I enjoy playing it when other games feel dry. I recommend if you looking for a fun game to mess around in. The owner clearly took time to make sure players have fun.
I love this game so much sad that it is discontinued so sad such a good game 😭
Pretty good the places don’t seem that cool
